title: turnera coccinea
intro: Turnera coccinea, also known as Sangre de Grado or Dragon's Blood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique, blood-red sap. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, known for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Turnera coccinea include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
